case_title: IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION VS. EVELYN J. CENTENO ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $859.00 FILED BY IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CENTENO, EVELYN J. INSPIRE LEARNING INSTITUTE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA C. HO. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CRISOSTOMO G. IBARRA--PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT INSPIRE LEARNING INSTITUTE WAS REPRESENTED BY EVELYN CENTENO--PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA C. HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CENTENO, EVELYN J.

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT CENTENO, EVELYN J. INSPIRE LEARNING INSTITUTE, INC. AS TO PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT INSPIRE LEARNING INSTITUTE, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED JAN-30-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CENTENO, EVELYN J. INSPIRE LEARNING INSTITUTE, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CENTENO, EVELYN J. INSPIRE LEARNING INSTITUTE, INC. PLAINTIFF IBARRA FAILED TO COMPLY WITH BUSINESS & PROFESSIONS CODE 6148 IN LETTER & SPIRIT & THE EXCEPTIONS THEREIN DO NOT APPLY. THERE IS NO WRITING TO CORROBORATE THE COMMENCEMENT OF A RELATIONSHIP WHERE THE PURPORTED CLIENT(S) KNOWINGLY AGREE TO PAY PLAINTIFF IBARRA AN AGREED UPON HOURLY RATE, A DESCRIPTION OF THE SCOPE OF REPRESENTATION OR ANY OTHER DETAILS. DOCUMENTS SUBMITTED BY BOTH PARTIES REVEAL NO EXPLICIT AGREEMENT BY DEFENDANTS TO PAY FOR SERVICES PRIOR TO THE ISSUANCE OF THE INVOICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2015 - JUDGMENT.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CENTENO, EVELYN J. INSPIRE LEARNING INSTITUTE, INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
